title: koeleria permollis
intro: Koeleria permollis, also known as purple hair grass, is a perennial grass species native to China and Mongolia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Koeleria permollis is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, and is often used to treat conditions like fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
